escalations.title: Handlebars.js Remote Code Injection
escalations.exploit_scenario: JavaScript injection via AST type confusion. Exploitable if any endpoint renders user-controlled data through Handlebars templates.
escalations.fix: cd Source/Backend && npm audit fix  (upgrades handlebars to >=4.7.9)

escalations.title: Protobufjs Arbitrary Code Execution
escalations.exploit_scenario: RCE when parsing untrusted .proto files or protobuf messages. platform/orchestrator manages Docker — potential container escape.
escalations.fix: Upgrade protobufjs to >=7.5.5 or dockerode to >=5.0.0

p1.title: GET /api/search not wired into app.ts
p1.description: searchRouter is defined and tested but never mounted. DependencyPicker typeahead (searchItems()) returns 404 in production — entire dependency-linking UI feature is non-functional.

p2.title: path-to-regexp ReDoS in route parsing
p2.fix: npm update path-to-regexp (in each affected project)

p2.title: picomatch Path traversal / ReDoS
p2.fix: cd portal/Frontend && npm update picomatch && npm audit fix

p2.title: uuid 5 major versions behind (buffer overflow CVE)
pino 2 major versions behind — likely unpatched security issues
p2.fix: npm install pino@latest in Source/Backend (check for breaking API changes)

p2.title: OTel tracing absent from Source/Backend
p2.description: No @opentelemetry/* imports in Source/Backend/src/. No spans, no traceparent header propagation. Both CLAUDE.md and FR-WF-013 mandate OTel.
p2.fix: Install @opentelemetry/sdk-node, auto-instrument HTTP + Express, propagate W3C traceparent

p2.title: dependencyCheckDuration histogram missing
p2.description: FR-dependency-metrics requires 4 Prometheus metrics; only 3 exist. Missing: dependency_check_duration histogram.
p2.fix: Add Histogram('dependency_check_duration') to metrics.ts, instrument computeHasUnresolvedBlockers and isReady

p2.title: Portal UpdateBugInput / UpdateFeatureRequestInput missing blocked_by?
p2.description: Both UpdateBugInput and UpdateFeatureRequestInput lack blocked_by?: string[]. Forces as any casts in portal/Frontend/src/components/shared/DependencyPicker.tsx:291,293.
p2.fix: Add blocked_by?: string[] to both interfaces in portal/Shared/api.ts

p2.title: Portal seed.ts not created
p2.description: portal/Backend/src/database/ has connection.ts and schema.ts only. seed.ts (idempotent dependency seeding on startup) is missing.
p2.fix: Create portal/Backend/src/database/seed.ts with idempotent seeding logic

p2.title: DependencySection.test.tsx and BlockedBadge.test.tsx missing
p2.description: DependencyPicker.test.tsx exists; the other two mandated test files do not.
p2.fix: Create DependencySection.test.tsx and BlockedBadge.test.tsx with component test coverage

p2.title: pending_dependencies status absent; dispatch-gating deviates from spec
p2.description: Spec says status becomes pending_dependencies when blockers block approval. Implementation keeps status as approved and returns HTTP 400. No PendingDependencies value in WorkItemStatus enum. UI shows blocked items as approved with no indicator.
p2.fix: Add pending_dependencies to WorkItemStatus enum + update backend transition logic + update frontend status display. Coordinate across Shared + Backend + Frontend layers.

p3.title: Traceability enforcer doesn't cover FR-dependency-* (13 requirements)
p3.fix: Add python3 tools/traceability-enforcer.py --file Plans/dependency-linking/requirements.md to CI verification gates

p3.title: FR-TMP-001..010 entirely untracked (platform/ audit needed)
p3.fix: Conduct solo-session audit of platform/ to assess FR-TMP-001..010 compliance

p3.title: eslint-disable react-hooks/exhaustive-deps suppressions without rationale
p3.fix: Fix hook dependencies correctly or add rationale comment explaining intentional suppression

p3.title: 22 moderate-severity CVEs across all 6 projects
p3.fix: See Teams/TheInspector/findings/dependency-audit-2026-04-29.md for full CVE list and remediation instructions

p4.title: Duplicate logger modules (logger.ts + utils/logger.ts)
p4.fix: Consolidate into single logger module; update all imports

p4.title: Wrong traceability ID in portal DependencyPicker.tsx:288
p4.fix: Change // Verifies: FR-0001 to // Verifies: FR-dependency-picker
